NAVAREA XIX 34/24
 1.M/V RAMFORM HYPERION IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS FROM 200001 UTC APR 24. TOWING 14 SESMIC CABLES AT 6NM LENGHT AND 1NM WITH 
 IN AREA BOUNDED BY: 

 A. 66-00.6N 003-40.2E
 B. 66-41.3N 002-07.4E
 C. 67-03.4N 003-53.5E
 D. 67-21.0N 003-59.9E
 E. 67-29.1N 004-41.8E
 F. 66-34.2N 006-32.1E
 G. 66-00.6N 003-40.2E

 2.WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 7NM ASTERN AND 3NM MILES AHEAD AND BOTH SIDES 
 SUPPORT VESSELS M/V THOR MAGNI AND M/V 7-VAVES
 VHF WORKING CHANNELS 72 AND 16

 3.END OF SEISMIC SURVEY: UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE
